note: ElevenLabs-generated SFX + music for the two in-app mini-games inside index.html (Bucky Jump = tab 'game', Cat Rescue = tab 'catgame'). Shared files are reused by both games to stay under budget. Loaded lazily by the MiniAudio module in index.html — never fetched on hub boot, only on first gesture inside a game tab.
